## Meeting Purpose

Internal sync on Vapi project progress, focusing on programmatic page creation and addressing client concerns.

## Key Takeaways

  - [Programmatic page creation is a priority; one page live, more needed urgently](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Image generation and voice samples are key blockers for scaling programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Client (Vapi) is anxious for progress, particularly on programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Editorial content is progressing well, but programmatic pages are seen as higher value](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

## Topics

### Programmatic Page Creation Status

  - [One page currently live, not in final state (mock-up elements remain)](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - Two main blockers:
    1.  Image generation: Unclear standards and source for custom images
    2.  Voice samples: Complicated to generate and integrate at scale

### Keyword Strategy for Programmatic Pages

  - [Emphasis on generating a wide range of long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Utilize ChatGPT to create extensive lists of use cases](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Focus on scale over nitty-gritty details](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [Matt to compile a list of keywords from existing Airtable data](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

### Client Expectations and Concerns

  - [Vapi team anxious to see more pages live](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Jordan (client) is excited about the project and wants to see constant progress](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
  - [Need to manage expectations regarding timeline for results](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)

### Technical SEO Questions

  - [Docs pages are indexed and have a sitemap (docs.vapi.ai/sitemap.xml)](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Pricing page is indexed (confirmed via site:vapi.ai/pricing search)](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)

### Next Steps and Action Items

  - [Kirkland to discuss priorities with Daniel and provide timeline update](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Matt to work on keyword variations for programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [Jürgen to generate 10-15 persona images using GPT or Image Journey](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Team to respond to external channel about docs/sitemap concerns](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Consider helping Vapi set up an attribution system for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/JVVzTKZUog4dWTWvh7gnZg9dTFhQCcFB?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)

## Next Steps

  - Kirkland: Provide timeline for programmatic page creation after discussion with Daniel
  - Matt: Compile extensive list of keywords and use cases for programmatic pages
  - Jürgen: Generate 10-15 persona images for use in programmatic pages
  - Team: Respond to Vapi about docs indexing and sitemap (non-issue, already in place)
  - Consider proposing attribution system setup to Vapi for better conversion tracking
